headline: Saka returns to full training ahead of weekend fixture
summary: Bukayo Saka completed his first full training session since the hamstring issue, per Arteta's Friday press conference. Expected to start.

headline: Arteta hints at shape change — Odegaard pushed higher
summary: Press conference Thursday: Arteta suggested Odegaard will play a more advanced role with Jorginho anchoring. Points to higher xG ceiling.

headline: Palmer doubtful for London derby
summary: Cole Palmer absent from final training session with a knock. Maresca says decision will be made Saturday morning. Chelsea's main creative outlet.

headline: Maresca signals pragmatic away setup
summary: Hints at a low-block, counter approach. Five at the back likely. Points to a low-scoring game if Arsenal can't break them down.

headline: Eze to start after returning from international duty
summary: Glasner confirms Eberechi Eze will start despite late return. Palace desperate for creativity after goalless run.

headline: Bowen ruled out with calf strain
summary: Jarrod Bowen confirmed out for 2-3 weeks. Major blow to West Ham's attacking threat — top scorer this season.

headline: Ancelotti: Vinicius 'needs a rest' — may drop to bench
summary: Carlo Ancelotti told reporters Vinicius Junior looked fatigued in midweek and could start on the bench. Rodrygo would move central.

headline: Real Madrid's dominant home record continues
summary: Unbeaten in 24 straight La Liga home matches. Opposition have only scored 0.6 goals per away game this season.

headline: Lewandowski returns from back issue
summary: Robert Lewandowski cleared by medical staff after missing the previous match. Flick confirms he'll start. 3 goals in his last 4 home games.

headline: Simeone switches to 4-4-2 diamond
summary: Atletico expected to play a diamond with Griezmann at the tip. Higher press, more shots on goal. Over 2.5 backers paying attention.

headline: Nico Williams available after suspension
summary: Nico Williams returns from one-match ban. Top creator for the club and has 4 assists in his last 5 starts.

headline: Budimir a doubt with hamstring tightness
summary: Ante Budimir, Osasuna's main striker, missed the final training session. Without him, goal threat is minimal.

headline: Mitoma starts after being rested midweek
summary: Kaoru Mitoma fully fit and expected to start. He's been rotated recently but is one of Brighton's most direct attackers.

headline: Lecce set up to absorb pressure
summary: Manager confirms a compact 5-4-1 at home. Lecce have averaged 1.4 goals conceded per home game this season.

headline: Kean confirmed to start as lone striker
summary: Moise Kean leads the line. Seven goals in his last nine matches. Fiorentina have been prolific away from home.

headline: Mallorca struggle against top-six opposition
summary: Only 1 win in their last 12 matches against La Liga top-half sides. Low-scoring pattern at home in these matchups.

headline: Hugo Duro out — Valencia short up front
summary: Hugo Duro ruled out with a thigh injury. Valencia have no natural backup in form — attack may struggle.

headline: Michel targets 'aggressive pressing' at home
summary: Michel says Girona will press high from the first whistle. Points to chaotic first-half goals pattern we've seen this season.

headline: Isco in the starting XI after rest
summary: Isco returns after being benched midweek. Betis look a different team with him orchestrating — main source of chance creation.

headline: Elche's home struggles against top teams
summary: Elche have been leaky at home this season — conceded 2+ goals in 6 of their last 8 home matches against top-half opponents.
